title: Career Agency, Success Criteria, and Search Constraints · Opportunity Brief: Search Runway
summary: A graduate is told to apply everywhere immediately, but has not defined acceptable work, financial runway, access needs, location, schedule, authorization, values, safety, or a stop rule. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the search runway increment in learner-owned career decision charter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal…
objectives: Model time, money, energy, care, health, and learning capacity under conservative search scenarios and escalation thresholds.
Separate hard constraints, flexible preferences, assumptions, unknowns, and resources without disclosing private reasons unnecessarily.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Search Runway · Theory Search Runway
steps.instruction:
theory case — A candidate with limited runway, caregiving duties, an access need, location limits, and two acceptable work arrangements is pressured to maximize application volume. The theory variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Search Runway contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Search Runway · Theory Search Runway.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for model time, money, energy, care, health, and learning capacity under conservative search scenarios and escalation thresholds. For Predict Search Runway · Theory Search Runway, keep Search Runway connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A candidate with limited runway, caregiving duties, an access need, location limits, and two acceptable work arrangements is pressured to maximize application volume. The theory variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Search Runway condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: BLS Occupational Outlook Handbook for Software Development and Quality Assurance — Controls U.S.-specific occupation duties, collaboration expectations, important qualities, education norms, wage interpretation, and projection caveats.

hints: For Predict Search Runway · Theory Search Runway, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Search Runway precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Predict Search Runway · Theory Search Runway, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A candidate with limited runway, caregiving duties, an access need, location limits, and two acceptable work arrangements is pressured to maximize application volume. The theory variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

For Predict Search Runway · Theory Search Runway, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: More applications always compensate for an unsustainable search pace.

options.text: More applications always compensate for an unsustainable search pace. That claim fails the predict search runway evidence boundary for Search Runway.

For predict search runway, apply Search Runway without its stated preconditions, omit the learner-owned career decision charter trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Search Runway for learner-owned career decision charter.
Model time, money, energy, care, health, and learning capacity under conservative search scenarios and escalation thresholds. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.

content.text: Model time, money, energy, care, health, and learning capacity under conservative search scenarios and escalation thresholds. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Search Runway while producing learner-owned career decision charter.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A candidate with limited runway, caregiving duties, an access need, location limits, and two acceptable work arrangements is pressured to maximize application volume. The worked example variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Model time, money, energy, care, health, and learning capacity under conservative search scenarios and escalation thresholds. A defensible solution applies Search Runway, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to learner-owned career decision charter.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-search-runway — Model time, money, energy, care, health, and learning capacity under conservative search scenarios and escalation thresholds.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-4
focus: career-search-runway
decision-evidence: Model time, money, energy, care, health, and learning capacity under conservative search scenarios and escalation thresholds.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: More applications always compensate for an unsustainable search pace. This fails the Search Runway contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: BLS Occupational Outlook Handbook for Software Development and Quality Assurance (2024 data and 2024-2034 projections; page modified 2025-08-28) — Controls U.S.-specific occupation duties, collaboration expectations, important qualities, education norms, wage interpretation, and projection caveats.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Model time, money, energy, care, health, and learning capacity under conservative search scenarios and escalation thresholds.
